name: codex-browser-agent
description: Primary browser automation path for Codex using Playwright MCP and a reusable browser profile.

interface.shortDescription: Primary browser automation path for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Codex Browser Agent as the standard browser path for Codex through a local Playwright MCP server with a persistent browser profile.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-browser-agent to open a site and tell me what is on the page
Read my feed and extract the top posts
Fill a form, but stop before final submit
